ucs.title: [LLM] BlackCat/ALPHV Rust binary execution via signature command-line tokens (--access-token, --propagated, --no-vm-kill)
ucs.description: Hunts the BlackCat/ALPHV/Noberus (CrowdStrike: ALPHA SPIDER) Rust-compiled ransomware binary, which is unique among major ransomware families in requiring an `--access-token` argument to decrypt its embedded configuration, and exposes a documented set of operator-toggle flags (`--paths`, `--child`, `--propagated`, `--no-prop-servers`, `--no-vm-kill`, `--no-vm-kill-names`, `--prop-file`, `--no-impers`, `--ui`, `--bypass`, `--extra-verbose`). These tokens are not present in other major RaaS families and are the highest-fidelity host-side artefact of an ALPHV detonation or test launch.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.process_path) as imagepath values(Processes.process_hash) as hash from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.user!="*$" AND Processes.user!="SYSTEM" AND (Processes.process="*--access-token*" OR Processes.process="*--no-prop-servers*" OR Processes.process="*--no-vm-kill*" OR Processes.process="*--no-vm-kill-names*" OR Processes.process="*--prop-file*" OR Processes.process="*--propagated*" OR Processes.process="*--no-impers*" OR (Processes.process="*--paths*" AND Processes.process="*--child*")) by host Processes.user Processes.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)` | eval signature="BlackCat/ALPHV Rust binary CLI tokens"
ucs.kql:
// BlackCat/ALPHV/Noberus Rust binary detonation — signature CLI tokens
// Refs: CISA AA23-061A, Microsoft Sec Blog (DEV-0496/Octo Tempest affiliates), Sophos X-Ops, Symantec Noberus reporting
let _alphv_singletons = dynamic([
    "access-token", "no-prop-servers", "no-vm-kill", "no-vm-kill-names",
    "prop-file", "propagated", "no-impers", "extra-verbose"
]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"                          // exclude machine accounts
| where AccountName !in~ ("system","local service","network service")
| extend CmdLower = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
| where CmdLower has_any (_alphv_singletons)
   or (CmdLower has "--paths" and CmdLower has_any ("--child","--ui ","--bypass"))
| extend MatchedTokens = set_intersect(_alphv_singletons,
        extract_all(@"(?i)--([a-z\-]+)", CmdLower))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          FileName, FolderPath, SHA256, SHA1,
          ProcessCommandLine,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ParentSHA256 = InitiatingProcessSHA256,
          IsRemoteSession = InitiatingProcessTokenElevation,
          MatchedTokens
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Sentinel port — requires Sysmon EID 1 or auditpol process-create with cmd-line capture (4688)
let _alphv_singletons = dynamic([
    "access-token", "no-prop-servers", "no-vm-kill", "no-vm-kill-names",
    "prop-file", "propagated", "no-impers", "extra-verbose"
]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where AccountType == "User"
| extend CmdLower = tolower(CommandLine)
| where CmdLower has_any (_alphv_singletons)
   or (CmdLower has "--paths" and CmdLower has_any ("--child","--ui ","--bypass"))
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
          NewProcessName, CommandLine,
          ParentProcessName, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: BlackCat/ALPHV Ransomware Command-Line Tokens
id: 8e2a4c1d-9b73-4f02-8c8f-alphv-cli-2026
status: experimental
description: Detects characteristic CLI arguments unique to the ALPHV/BlackCat/Noberus (Rust) ransomware binary, including the mandatory --access-token flag and propagation/anti-VM-kill toggles documented by CISA, Sophos, and Symantec.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-061a
  - https://news.sophos.com/en-us/2022/07/14/blackcat-ransomware-attacks-not-merely-a-byproduct-of-bad-luck/
  - https://symantec-enterprise-blogs.security.com/blogs/threat-intelligence/coreid-noberus-blackcat-ransomware
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.impact
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.t1027
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_singleton:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '--access-token'
      - '--no-prop-servers'
      - '--no-vm-kill'
      - '--no-vm-kill-names'
      - '--prop-file'
      - '--propagated'
      - '--no-impers'
      - '--extra-verbose'
  selection_pair_paths:
    CommandLine|contains: '--paths'
  selection_pair_partner:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '--child'
      - '--ui '
      - '--bypass'
  filter_machine_account:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: (selection_singleton or (selection_pair_paths and selection_pair_partner)) and not filter_machine_account
falsepositives:
  - Highly unlikely. These flags are specific to the ALPHV/BlackCat Rust binary and are not consumed by any common LOLBin or admin tool.
level: critical
ucs.rationale: Unlike LockBit, Conti, Royal, or BlackBasta — whose binaries either hard-code their config or pull it from a separate file — ALPHV/BlackCat is the first major ransomware compiled in Rust and intentionally requires an `--access-token` argument at runtime to AES-decrypt its embedded JSON config. The other matched flags (`--no-vm-kill`, `--no-vm-kill-names`, `--prop-file`, `--propagated`, `--no-imper
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] BlackCat/ALPHV pre-encryption playbook: shadow-deletion + bcdedit boot tamper + log clear + Veeam/SQL service stop within 5 minutes
ucs.description: Hunts the documented ALPHA SPIDER pre-encryption host-prep chain executed seconds before BlackCat detonation: Volume Shadow Copy deletion (vssadmin/wmic), Windows Recovery Environment disablement (bcdedit), Windows event log clearing (wevtutil cl), backup catalog deletion (wbadmin), and termination of Veeam / SQL / Exchange / EDR services. BlackCat affiliates execute these as a stitched batch/PowerShell script before launching the Rust binary; observing 3+ stages on the same host within a 5-minute window is a near-certain ransomware-imminent signal characteristic of this RaaS.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_name) as proc values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.user!="*$" AND ( (Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*" AND Processes.process="*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*No*" OR Processes.process="*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="wevtutil.exe" AND Processes.process="*cl *") OR ((Processes.process_name="net.exe" OR Processes.process_name="net1.exe" OR Processes.process_name="sc.exe" OR Processes.process_name="powershell.exe") AND Processes.process="*stop*" AND (Processes.process="*veeam*" OR Processes.process="*MSSQL*" OR Processes.process="*MSExchange*" OR Processes.process="*Sophos*" OR Processes.process="*Symantec*" OR Processes.process="*backup*")) ) by _time host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval stage=case(process_name="vssadmin.exe" OR process_name="wmic.exe","ShadowDelete", process_name="bcdedit.exe","BootTamper", process_name="wbadmin.exe","BackupDelete", process_name="wevtutil.exe","LogClear", true(),"ServiceStop") | bin _time span=5m as window | stats dc(stage) as distinct_stages values(stage) as stages values(process) as commands values(process_name) as binaries min(_time) as firstSeen max(_time) as lastSeen by host user window | where distinct_stages>=3 | `security_content_ctime(firstSeen)` | `security_content_ctime(lastSeen)`
ucs.kql:
// ALPHA SPIDER / BlackCat pre-encryption host-prep playbook — 3+ stages in <5m
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let WindowMinutes = 5m;
let PlaybookEvents =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | extend CmdLower = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
    | extend Stage = case(
        FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and CmdLower has "delete shadows",                                 "ShadowDelete",
        FileName =~ "wmic.exe"      and CmdLower has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"),                       "ShadowDelete",
        FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
            and CmdLower has_any ("get-wmiobject win32_shadowcopy","win32_shadowcopy","remove-wmiobject"), "ShadowDelete",
        FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"   and (CmdLower has "recoveryenabled no" or CmdLower has "ignoreallfailures"), "BootTamper",
        FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe"   and CmdLower has "delete",                                          "BackupDelete",
        FileName =~ "wevtutil.exe"  and CmdLower has "cl ",                                             "LogClear",
        FileName in~ ("net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe") and CmdLower has "stop"
            and CmdLower has_any ("veeam","mssql","sql","msexchange","backup",
                                  "sophos","sense","defender","symantec","mcafee","trendmicro","crowdstrike"), "ServiceStop",
        FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and CmdLower has "stop-service"
            and CmdLower has_any ("veeam","sql","exchange","backup","sophos","sense"),                  "ServiceStop",
        ""
      )
    | where Stage != "";
PlaybookEvents
| summarize
    DistinctStages = dcount(Stage),
    Stages         = make_set(Stage),
    SampleCommands = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 25),
    Binaries       = make_set(FileName),
    Users          = make_set(AccountName),
    FirstSeen      = min(Timestamp),
    LastSeen       = max(Timestamp)
    by DeviceName, bin(Timestamp, WindowMinutes)
| where DistinctStages >= 3                              // 3+ distinct sabotage stages within 5m == BlackCat detonation prelude
| extend WindowDurationSec = datetime_diff('second', LastSeen, FirstSeen)
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Sentinel port — relies on EID 4688 process-create with command-line auditing enabled
let WindowMinutes = 5m;
let PlaybookEvents =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend Image = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1])),
             CmdLower = tolower(CommandLine)
    | extend Stage = case(
        Image == "vssadmin.exe" and CmdLower has "delete shadows",                                  "ShadowDelete",
        Image == "wmic.exe"      and CmdLower has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"),                       "ShadowDelete",
        Image in ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
            and CmdLower has_any ("win32_shadowcopy","remove-wmiobject"),                            "ShadowDelete",
        Image == "bcdedit.exe"   and (CmdLower has "recoveryenabled no" or CmdLower has "ignoreallfailures"), "BootTamper",
        Image == "wbadmin.exe"   and CmdLower has "delete",                                          "BackupDelete",
        Image == "wevtutil.exe"  and CmdLower has "cl ",                                             "LogClear",
        Image in ("net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe") and CmdLower has "stop"
            and CmdLower has_any ("veeam","mssql","sql","msexchange","backup","sophos","sense","defender","symantec","mcafee","crowdstrike"), "ServiceStop",
        Image in ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and CmdLower has "stop-service"
            and CmdLower has_any ("veeam","sql","exchange","backup","sophos"),                       "ServiceStop",
        ""
      )
    | where Stage != "";
PlaybookEvents
| summarize
    DistinctStages = dcount(Stage),
    Stages         = make_set(Stage),
    SampleCommands = make_set(CommandLine, 25),
    FirstSeen      = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen       = max(TimeGenerated)
    by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, WindowMinutes)
| where DistinctStages >= 3
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Each individual stage (vssadmin delete shadows, bcdedit recoveryenabled No, wevtutil cl, net stop Veeam) appears in legitimate IT activity in isolation — admins do troubleshoot backup, recovery, and event logs — but the *sequenced co-occurrence of three or more distinct stages on the same host within five minutes* is the documented playbook BlackCat affiliates ship as a single .bat/.ps1 dropped vi
